'''govazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadish|roadish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadish|roadish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| govazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:govazithi|govazithi]] || [[word:govaziji|govaziji]] || [[word:govazishi|govazishi]] || [[word:govaziki|govaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:govazuthuthu|govazuthuthu]] || [[word:govazujuju|govazujuju]] || [[word:govazushushu|govazushushu]] || [[word:govazukuku|govazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:govazuthu|govazuthu]] || [[word:govazuju|govazuju]] || [[word:govazushu|govazushu]] || [[word:govazuku|govazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:govazufthuf|govazufthuf]] || [[word:govazufjuf|govazufjuf]] || [[word:govazufshuf|govazufshuf]] || [[word:govazufkuf|govazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:govazethe|govazethe]] || [[word:govazeje|govazeje]] || [[word:govazeshe|govazeshe]] || [[word:govazeke|govazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:govazothotho|govazothotho]] || [[word:govazojojo|govazojojo]] || [[word:govazoshosho|govazoshosho]] || [[word:govazokoko|govazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:govazotho|govazotho]] || [[word:govazojo|govazojo]] || [[word:govazosho|govazosho]] || [[word:govazoko|govazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:govazofthof|govazofthof]] || [[word:govazofjof|govazofjof]] || [[word:govazofshof|govazofshof]] || [[word:govazofkof|govazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:govazÃŸfthÃŸf|govazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfjÃŸf|govazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfshÃŸf|govazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfkÃŸf|govazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:govazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|govazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|govazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|govazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|govazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:govazÃŸfthÃŸf|govazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfjÃŸf|govazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfshÃŸf|govazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfkÃŸf|govazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:govazÃŸfthÃŸf|govazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfjÃŸf|govazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfshÃŸf|govazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govazÃŸfkÃŸf|govazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:govazÃḊthÃḊ|govazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:govazÃḊjÃḊ|govazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:govazÃḊshÃḊ|govazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:govazÃḊkÃḊ|govazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:govazathatha|govazathatha]] || [[word:govazajaja|govazajaja]] || [[word:govazashasha|govazashasha]] || [[word:govazakaka|govazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:govazatha|govazatha]] || [[word:govazaja|govazaja]] || [[word:govazasha|govazasha]] || [[word:govazaka|govazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:govazafthaf|govazafthaf]] || [[word:govazafjaf|govazafjaf]] || [[word:govazafshaf|govazafshaf]] || [[word:govazafkaf|govazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:govazasha|govazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:govazshÃḋsha|govazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govazrosha|govazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govazmusha|govazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:govazyasha|govazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovaznkshÃḋsha|gogovaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovaznkrosha|gogovaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovaznkmusha|gogovaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovaznkyasha|gogovaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:govavazasha|govavazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govavazshÃḋsha|govavazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govavazrosha|govavazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govavazmusha|govavazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govavazyasha|govavazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovavaznkshÃḋsha|gogovavaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovavaznkrosha|gogovavaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovavaznkmusha|gogovavaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovavaznkyasha|gogovavaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gevÃḊzasha|gevÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gevÃḊzshÃḋsha|gevÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gevÃḊzrosha|gevÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gevÃḊzmusha|gevÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gevÃḊzyasha|gevÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogevÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gogevÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogevÃḊznkrosha|gogevÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogevÃḊznkmusha|gogevÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogevÃḊznkyasha|gogevÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:govfazasha|govfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govfazshÃḋsha|govfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govfazrosha|govfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govfazmusha|govfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govfazyasha|govfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovfaznkshÃḋsha|gogovfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovfaznkrosha|gogovfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovfaznkmusha|gogovfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovfaznkyasha|gogovfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
